title: OverMan's Quiet place
description: Adds deadly monsters from quiet place
body:
Mod needs the GeckoLib to work!

So called "Death angels" came here from space and can kill anything in matter of second... However they are blind.

You'll have to survive in the world where any sound you create might be your last.
No weapon can kill them, no wall will stop them, their only weakness is high frequency sound, use it to defend yourself.
Also, wool makes most sounds undetectable for monsters so you can for example safely place blocks on it.
 

 

Videos about it:
 
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/vOhOEkFBl-A" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/MN6T3DcCTO0" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>







![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e6aa0a8548a41ca00e3b4861cc36b9486890be93.png)

Mod is compatible with [Voiceless survival](https://modrinth.com/mod/voiceless-survival) so if you want Death angels to hear your voice use it.
It might be bugged right now but it'll be fixed.

Thanks to [Armilp](https://modrinth.com/user/armilp) for making it possible!
 

 

 

And thank you guys for the feedback and playing my mod! Without you it still would be some low quality slop.
